title: BetterFFA
description: A all in one Free-For-All plugin for minecraft servers, supports 1.20-1.21+
body:
> # BetterFFA 1.0.0

> ## About
> BetterFFA is a all in one Free-For-All plugin, join the FFA arena to fight against different players

> ## Features
1. Create/Delete/Edit Arenas
2. Create/Delete/Edit Kits
3. Auto Arena Reset System After A Fixed Interval [Configurable]
4. Per Player Kit Layout Editor
5. Top Player Scoreboard, Different For Each Arena
6. Get Control Over Each Arena Using Arena Options
7. Lag Free Plugin

> ## Installation
1. Download the latest version of the plugin
2. Stop your server
2. Upload the downloaded plugin to your plugins folder
3. Start the server

> ## YouTube Tutorials
> Coming soon..
